text: Here, in this modern corridor, I sense a merging of potential—glass, technology, and bright lights promise passage into a world of curiosity. As I step into the R+D space, I am invigorated by the colorful energy and the focus on innovation. Surrounded by the language of progress, screens, and books, I experience the thrill of being on the edge of discovery, contemplating how thought and creativity become material, how ideas shape the very spaces we move through. I feel inspired, open, and eager for insight.
